project.name: 主动健康管理 - 业务监管大屏
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Health management B2B monitoring dashboard, Semi Design dark theme, blue primary accent, data-dense KPI cards with charts, professional medical operations tone
project.designRead: dashboard / B2B health management / professional data-dense / high density / generic flat dashboard

colorSystem.primaryColorRole: Semi Design blue #387bff for primary actions and active states
colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: single blue primary; health status uses green/yellow/red semantic tokens
colorSystem.stateColors: health-green, health-yellow, health-red for resident health ratings; success/warning/danger/info for system states

styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: Semi Design restrained radius: 3-8px for cards, 6px for buttons, 12px for large panels
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: Inter + PingFang SC + Microsoft YaHei, 14px body, 12px caption, monospace for KPI values
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: Semi Design card language: subtle borders, no heavy shadows, surface layering
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: dark background #1d2129, card #24292f, elevated #2c323a, border rgba(255,255,255,0.08)
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: no decorative images; SVG icons for status indicators; CSS-only charts
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: subtle hover transitions, no animations, data-refresh feel

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: top header bar with logo, title, date/time, and user avatar

designSource.designDecisionSummary: Semi Design inspired dark theme dashboard for health management monitoring. Blue primary (#387bff), dark backgrounds (#1d2129/#24292f), health status colors (green/yellow/red), monospace KPI values, CSS-only charts, data-dense grid layout.

pages.title: 业务监管大屏
pages.businessScenario: Health management institution monitoring dashboard showing KPIs, alerts, doctor performance, device status, and alert trends
pages.visualNorthStar: Dark data-dense dashboard with Semi Design aesthetics: blue accent KPI cards, CSS-only charts, health status color coding, professional medical operations feel
qualityRisks: dense data layout needs careful spacing
CSS-only charts may need precise positioning
